Leaderboard

Leaderboard

Benchmark results for communication and compression performance across different backends and configurations.

Rank Model / Config Backend Metric Value Date
1 AllReduce 1GB NCCL Bandwidth 97.1 GB/s 2025-05-15
2 AllReduce 512MB NCCL Bandwidth 94.7 GB/s 2025-05-01
3 AllReduce 256MB NCCL Bandwidth 89.2 GB/s 2025-05-01
4 AllGather 512MB NCCL Bandwidth 85.1 GB/s 2025-05-10
5 AllReduce 512MB (ccl-comp) NCCL Throughput 81.6 GB/s 2025-06-01
6 AllGather 256MB NCCL Bandwidth 78.5 GB/s 2025-05-10
7 AllReduce 256MB (ccl-comp) NCCL Throughput 72.3 GB/s 2025-06-01
8 AllReduce 1GB MPI Bandwidth 56.2 GB/s 2025-05-15
9 AllReduce 512MB MPI Bandwidth 52.8 GB/s 2025-05-01
10 AllReduce 256MB MPI Bandwidth 45.3 GB/s 2025-05-01
11 Latency 1B MPI Latency 12.5 us 2025-05-01
12 Latency 1B NCCL Latency 8.2 us 2025-05-01

CC-Bench

  • CC-Bench

    A modular benchmark framework for HPC scenarios, supporting MPI / NCCL / RCCL communication backends with LD_PRELOAD-based instrumentation.
